claude-sub.note: Anthropic subscription via local claude CLI. No API key. Separate context from the orchestrator. Opus/Sonnet window ~200K tokens.

zai.note: z.ai GLM. Use bare glm-5.2 (the [1m] suffix is rejected). 1M VERIFIED 2026-06-16 via needle test: ceiling 1,048,576 tok, ~0.264 tok/char (keep prompts <=~3.9M chars). Over-limit returns HTTP 200 + empty text + stop_reason=model_context_window_exceeded (NOT an error). 1M prefill ~40-60s — 600s budget.

opencode-go.note: OpenCode Go flat-rate subscription. Paid-tier models covered, zero-retention. deepseek-v4-pro is a REASONING model — its internal reasoning consumes the output budget, so on complex tasks an 8192 cap truncated the answer (finish_reason=length). max_tokens raised to 64000 (model output limit is 384K); a cap only prevents truncation, successful answers stop early so there is no latency/cost penalty. 1M VERIFIED 2026-06-16 via needle test: ceiling 1,048,565 tok, ~0.295 tok/char (keep prompts <=~3.55M chars). 600s budget.

opencode-zen.note: OpenCode Zen pay-per-token. Free models are NOT zero-retention. Do NOT send proprietary code here. Context limit conservative/unverified (128K assumed).

codex.note: OpenAI Codex subscription (GPT-5.5). Uses Responses API with SSE streaming. Requires: instructions (auto-injected), store=false, stream=true. Does NOT support max_output_tokens. Auth: run 'codex auth login', CCF reads ~/.codex/auth.json automatically. Cloudflare requires codex_cli_rs User-Agent + originator + ChatGPT-Account-ID headers.
